{"success":true,"response":"Process J09B has been executed end-to-end according to the defined rules.

Key outcomes:
- Temporary table `J09B_temp` was created from `decision_table` (rows with `TOUR` starting with `J09B`) and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA/EVU, then overrides applied).
- Data was enriched via joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, and customer data was selected per record (preferring `SALES_MASTER` when available, otherwise `NET_MASTER`).
- Mandatory meter reading households were identified using `EABL`, their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `MANDATORY_READING`, and:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (792 rows) was generated and
  - emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- Trustworthy self-reading households were identified using `EABL`, their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `DIRECT_MAIL` (without overwriting `MANDATORY_READING`), and:
  - `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` (4068 rows) was generated and
  - used for bulk email dispatch via `send_bulk_mail` (4068 emails sent).
- Remaining households (neither `MANDATORY_READING` nor `DIRECT_MAIL`) were exported:
  - `J09B.csv` (15320 rows) was generated and
  - emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary/intermediate tables (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_work`, `J09B_work2`, `J09B_mandatory_eq`, `J09B_direct_eq`) were dropped.

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or sample rows from any of the three CSV outputs.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
Process J09B has been executed end-to-end according to the defined rules.

Key outcomes:
- Temporary table `J09B_temp` was created from `decision_table` (rows with `TOUR` starting with `J09B`) and classified into `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA/EVU, then overrides applied).
- Data was enriched via joins with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, and customer data was selected per record (preferring `SALES_MASTER` when available, otherwise `NET_MASTER`).
- Mandatory meter reading households were identified using `EABL`, their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `MANDATORY_READING`, and:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (792 rows) was generated and
  - emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- Trustworthy self-reading households were identified using `EABL`, their `ENTSCHEIDUNG` set to `DIRECT_MAIL` (without overwriting `MANDATORY_READING`), and:
  - `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` (4068 rows) was generated and
  - used for bulk email dispatch via `send_bulk_mail` (4068 emails sent).
- Remaining households (neither `MANDATORY_READING` nor `DIRECT_MAIL`) were exported:
  - `J09B.csv` (15320 rows) was generated and
  - emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary/intermediate tables (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_work`, `J09B_work2`, `J09B_mandatory_eq`, `J09B_direct_eq`) were dropped.

If you want, I can show you the exact SQL used or sample rows from any of the three CSV outputs.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09B` has been executed successfully end-to-end according to its defined rule set.

Summary of what was done:

- Filtered `decision_table` for rows where `TOUR` starts with `J09B`, created a temp table, and assigned `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA/EVU with overrides).
- Enriched data by joining with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, choosing the best-available customer data per record.
- Identified **mandatory meter reading** households from `EABL`:
  - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
  - Generated `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (792 rows).
  - Emailed it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- Identified **trustworthy self-reading** households:
  - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'` (without overwriting `MANDATORY_READING`).
  - Generated `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` (4068 rows).
  - Triggered bulk email dispatch (4068 emails) via `send_bulk_mail`.
- Exported all **remaining** households:
  - Generated `J09B.csv` (15320 rows).
  - Emailed it to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Cleaned up all intermediate tables:
  - Dropped `J09B_temp`, `J09B_work`, `J09B_work2`, `J09B_mandatory_eq`, `J09B_direct_eq`.

Tell me if youŌĆÖd like:
- The exact SQL / logic for any step, or  
- A schema / sample rows for one of the CSV files.
